hero.title: Hello, I'm Lulu
hero.description: I believe in "Design is Connection" and aspire to use the power of design to connect people together.

home.title: Welcome to Lulu's Site
home.subtitle: A personal website built with Vue 3 + Vite

about.title: About Me
about.note1-back: A versatile blend of product strategy, UX design, design systems, front-end development, and AI workflow design.
about.note2-back: Comprehensive experience spanning user research, solution design, development handoff, and continuous iteration.
about.note3-back: Expert in experience design for enterprise platforms, complex workflows, and multi-role collaboration scenarios.
about.note4-back: Experience in designing AI Agent, human-AI collaboration, and automated workflow products.
about.note5-back: Skilled at building design systems from scratch to improve efficiency and product consistency.

project1.title: Moxo AI
project1.description: Designing Agentic Workflows for Human + AI Collaboration

detail.designingForBothAutomationAnd: Designing for both automation and control
detail.fromAiToolsToAi: From AI tools to AI systems
detail.aiThatAdaptsToYour: AI that adapts to your processes, rules, and playbooks
detail.makingAiBehaviorVisibleAnd: Making AI Behavior Visible and Understandable
detail.inEnterpriseCollaborationBusinessProcess: In enterprise collaboration, business processes are scattered across multiple systems,
detail.relyingHeavilyOnManualOperations: relying heavily on manual operations with low efficiency and lack of consistency.
detail.althoughGenerativeAiHasPowerful: Although generative AI has powerful capabilities, in actual products it still mainly serves as:
detail.aToolRatherThanA: a tool, rather than a process participant.
detail.weNeedToBuildAn: We need to build an Agentic AI Workflow System,
detail.whileEnsuringThatKeyDecisions: while ensuring that key decisions remain under human control.
detail.theDesignOpportunityLiesNot: The design opportunity lies not in adding an AI feature, but in building a system that allows AI to operate within workflows. To this end, I have broken down the overall capability into four core modules:
detail.aiCopilotTheInteractionGateway: AI Copilot: The interaction gateway between users and AI
detail.multiAgentSystemAiUnits: Multi-Agent System: AI units that execute different tasks
detail.toolingTheActualCapabilitiesThat: Tooling: The actual capabilities that AI invokes
detail.humanInTheLoopThe: Human-in-the-Loop: The mechanism to ensure controllability
detail.aiAutomaticallyCompletesInformationColle: AI automatically completes information collection, form pre-filling, and material organization, making tasks complete and executable before reaching humans.
detail.aiInstantlyChecksCompletenessAccuracy: AI instantly checks completeness, accuracy, and compliance upon submission, exposing issues before they impact the workflow.
detail.aiAutomaticallyAssignsTasksBased: AI automatically assigns tasks based on roles and workflows, triggering subsequent steps to ensure tasks always flow between the right people.
detail.aiContinuouslyMonitorsWorkflowStatus: AI continuously monitors workflow status, identifies risks and delays, and proactively alerts or escalates.
detail.aiCopilotIsDesignedAs: AI Copilot is designed as one of the interaction gateways between users and AI, serving as a collaborative assistant in workflows.
detail.embeddingAiNaturallyIntoWorkflows: Embedding AI naturally into workflows rather than interrupting user tasks
detail.reducingUserInputCostsBased: Reducing user input costs based on context
detail.providingClearFeedbackToMake: Providing clear feedback to make AI behavior understandable and predictable
detail.toSupportComplexBusinessScenarios: To support complex business scenarios, I have broken down AI capabilities into multiple Agents with different responsibilities.
detail.actionAgentsExecuteSpecificTasks: Action Agents: Execute specific tasks, data extraction, file processing, workflow routing, etc.
detail.summarizeInformationProvideSuggestionsAn: Summarize information, provide suggestions, and help users complete tasks.
detail.throughModularDesignAiCan: Through modular design, AI can be flexibly orchestrated within workflows to achieve collaborative work.
detail.theDesignFocusIsOn: The design focus is on abstracting complex capabilities into standardized interfaces while maintaining flexibility and extensibility.
detail.introducingHumanInTheLoop: Introducing Human-in-the-Loop mechanisms at critical nodes allows users to intervene in and control AI behavior.
detail.thisDesignImprovesEfficiencyWhile: This design improves efficiency while ensuring workflow reliability and security.
detail.aiPushesWorkflowsForwardBut: AI pushes workflows forward, but key decisions are always made by humans
detail.allTasksArePreparedVerified: All tasks are prepared, verified, and organized before reaching humans
detail.aiAgentsOnlyOperateWithin: AI Agents only operate within the scope of their role permissions
detail.aiImprovesWorkflowEfficiencyWhile: AI improves workflow efficiency while humans remain responsible for final outcomes
detail.moxoAiIsNotA: Moxo AI is not a freely running agent, but is adapted to the real operational methods of enterprises:
detail.includingWorkflowsRolesPermissionsRules: Including workflows, roles, permissions, rules, and approval logic.
detail.aiDrivesWorkflowExecutionOutside: AI drives workflow execution outside of key decisions, but always operates within established rules and boundaries.
detail.aiLearnsWorkflowStepsRole: AI learns workflow steps, role divisions, and execution rules to ensure behavior aligns with established playbooks
detail.agentsAlwaysAdhereToPermission: Agents always adhere to permission controls, compliance requirements, and escalation paths
detail.knowingWhenToExecuteAnd: Knowing When to Execute and When to Wait
detail.aiAutomaticallyAdvancesStandardWorkflows: AI automatically advances standard workflows but pauses at critical nodes for human handling
detail.ai_1: AI系统往往具有“黑盒”特征，用户难以理解当前状态与执行过程。
detail.weNeedToBuildA: We need to build a unified system feedback mechanism to make the AI execution process clearly visible:
detail.statusVisualizationNotStartedIn: Status visualization (Not started / In progress / Completed / Failed)
detail.aiAgentCollaboratesWithHumans: AI Agent collaborates with humans in the same workflow, achieving automatic task advancement and human decision-making at critical nodes.
detail.yourBrowserDoesNotSupport: Your browser does not support video playback.
detail.averageWorkflowCompletionSpeedImproved: Average workflow completion speed improved by 2.6x, significantly shortening task delivery cycles.
detail.aiAgentsHaveCompleted744: AI Agents have completed 744 task executions, reducing repetitive manual operations.
detail.theNumberOfBusinessWorkflows: The number of business workflows enabled by AI has grown more than 3x, covering more business scenarios.
detail.bringingNewOpportunitiesContinuouslyThro: Bringing new opportunities continuously through more efficient workflow response and collaboration experience.
detail.aiDrivenNaturalWorkflowConversion: AI-driven natural workflow conversion outperforms traditional paid acquisition paths.
detail.theBusinessProcessingScaleSupported: The business processing scale supported by the system has grown rapidly with good scalability.
detail.byDelegatingRepetitiveExecutionTo: By delegating repetitive execution to AI and preserving key judgment for humans, Moxo AI has established a sustainable business value model between efficiency, growth, and controllability.
detail.trustIsTheCoreOf: Trust is the Core of AI Products
detail.whetherUsersAdoptAiDepends: Whether users adopt AI depends on understanding its behavior and being able to control it at critical moments
detail.thePrerequisiteForEfficiencyGains: The prerequisite for efficiency gains is that users always retain key decision-making power
detail.onlyWhenAiBehaviorIs: Only when AI behavior is visible and understandable will users truly rely on the system
detail.fromUserOperationsToSystem: From User Operations to System Collaboration
detail.fromInterfaceDesignToWorkflow: From Interface Design to Workflow Design
detail.fromFeatureDesignToRules: From Feature Design to Rules and Mechanism Design
detail.provideMoreIntuitiveWorkflowVisualizatio: Provide more intuitive workflow visualization capabilities
detail.reduceLearningCostsForComplex: Reduce learning costs for complex configurations
detail.introduceSmarterDefaultStrategiesTo: Introduce smarter default strategies to reduce user decision burden
detail.theCollaborationModelBetweenHumans: The collaboration model between humans and AI will become the core proposition of next-generation UX
detail.moxoDesignIsBasedOnA: Moxo's design is based on a simple but critical principle: key decisions must be made by humans, who bear the responsibility. AI Agents are responsible for driving workflows but will not replace decision-makers.
detail.toEnableAiToTrulyExecute: To enable AI to truly execute tasks, I designed a Tooling mechanism that allows Agents to invoke actual business capabilities:

project3.title: Design System Evolution with Design Tokens
project3.description: Significantly boosting design efficiency and UI consistency across light/dark mode and multi-brand designs.
